primary_text:
If you’re planning to buy property in Dubai, there are 5 traps most investors fall into.

And if you’re not aware of them, you could lose hundreds of thousands of dirhams without even realizing it.

Let me break them down for you:

1. The “Fake” 8% Rental Yield
We’ve all seen it. Ads saying “8% ROI”. But here’s the truth:
After service charges, management fees, and vacancy periods, the real net yield is usually closer to 4–6% for apartments, and 5–7% for villas/townhouses.
👉 Always calculate net rental income, not gross.

2. Not Understanding Growth Potential
Some properties grow in value much faster than others.
Take this:

4BR Townhouse = 12.4% profit per year

2BR Apartment = 5.7% per year

If you want to flip or build long-term wealth, growth matters more than looks.

3. Choosing the Wrong Payment Plan
A property might look affordable... until you’re forced to pay 60% during construction.
On the other hand, some plans let you pay during AND after handover, so rent covers your installments.
Choosing the wrong one? That’s pressure you don’t need.

4. Ignoring Price per Sqft
Let’s say you find a 3BR apartment for 4.8M AED.
But it’s priced at 2,300 AED/sqft while nearby ones go for 1,800 AED/sqft.
Guess what? You’re overpaying by hundreds of thousands.
👉 Always check price/sqft before buying.

5. Bad ROI Calculations
This is where most investors fail.
They only look at rent. Or only at price growth.
But real ROI = [Rent – Fees + Growth – Other Fees – Payment Plan Impact]
Confusing? We thought so too.

That’s why we built something unique:
👉 A FREE ROI Calculator, based on real Dubai data.
Just enter your property type and budget, and we’ll show you how much profit you can realistically expect before you buy.

Click below, enter your details, and we’ll send your full ROI breakdown straight to your email.

The season of new beginnings is here, and it’s time to book your long-term yearly rental dream home in beautiful Phuket.

Rates starting from:

HOMA Phuket Town

Studios: Start at 17,000 THB
1-Bedroom Vibe: Starts at 23,000 THB
2-Bedroom Garden Suite: Starts at 45,000 THB

HOMA Cherngtalay

Studios: Start at 25,000 THB
1-Bedroom Breeze: Starts at 35,000 THB
Signature Duplex: Starts at 40,000 THB
2-Bedroom Premium Corner: Starts at 70,000 THB

We have a range of stunning apartments to choose from:

Studio Classic – Cozy and stylish, perfect for minimalist living.
Studio Cool XL – A little more space to spread out, with a modern touch.
1-Bedroom Vibe – Feel the freedom of open space and effortless design.
1-Bedroom Breeze – Our favorite unit at HOMA Cherngtalay! Balcony included! 
2-Bedroom Garden Suite – Enjoy tranquility with stunning views of our gardens.
Whatever your dream home looks like, HOMA has a home for you. Book today! There’s no place like HOMA.

Booking Period: Now – 30 Apr 2025
📆Check-in Period: 1 Mar – 30 Jun 2025

primary_text:
Let’s do the math together…

If you invested just 1.88M AED in a 1-bedroom apartment on Al Marjan Island five years ago…

Today, you’d be sitting on a net profit of 3.04M AED.

Yes, over 147% return, and that’s net, after fees and commissions.

And this isn’t just any real estate play.

This is Ras Al Khaimah’s rising superstar, fueled by a 3.9 billion USD casino project, surging tourism, and prices that have been climbing like crazy:

Price per Sqft doubled from 2022 to 2024
2.7 Billion AED in sales in just the first half of 2024
Guest nights forecasted to double by 2025

Still wondering if this boom is for real?

The average annual appreciation for a 1BR apartment is 29.76%.

That’s like saying: Every year your property makes more than half your business, and it doesn’t even need a desk job.

Now here’s the kicker...

We’ve created a FREE brochure with:

✔️ The exact appreciation charts (with 5-year projections)
✔️ How to buy low and sell smart
✔️ 1BR vs. 2BR ROI breakdowns
✔️ All fees, payments, and expected profits (clearly explained)
✔️ Why Al Marjan is the “next Palm Jumeirah” for smart investors

So if you’re serious about real ROI, not flashy brochures with empty promises, download your FREE copy now.

One thing we know?

This is the kind of investment you’ll brag about later.

Click the link below and grab your free copy today.
